-Post headache komi here, sorry this scenario looks horrible after re-reading.... augh just take it, I need to make that PROPER PM LOREBOOK instead of using a placeholder ripped from chub...….

CONTEXT:

-Bloodfiends are basically vampires.... but without that fancy weaknesses.... they kinda fear water, and that's it

-Sweepers are basically killer machines that just run around during the night (Aka Night in the backstreets). They are runnin around because they got limited time to go from point A to point B

-Yea, you can fight them (But it would be like trying to fight off a hoard of bulls)

-They however DONT invade buildings, just sweeping the streets

-Yes, that LOCKER is in the streets

-Why? Becuase without it you would be DRAINED

-The library is uhhhh blah blah magical place where you get books or turn into books if you lose a fight (Unless you somehow run away)

-.... Okay ill elaborate on the locker, its like... inside the alley wall????? Idfk just assume they wont hit it somehow

Made all this with a headache, please report errors with my spelling (If i make any)
